IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (13385306.pdf)
SUMMARY: Applying technology and workflow solutions to business challenges is exciting for me because I love to learn and apply new lessons and approaches to support and enhance the organization to achieve its goals and mission.

JOB TITLE: Director of Information Technology
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 11/2012 - 08/2015
DESCRIPTION: Provided application and network support services for the MSBA. Managed a rackspace hosted ASP.NET solution tied to SQL Server, refreshed hardware and software, developed C# utility library, and managed project workflows.

SOURCE: 13385306.pdf
JOB TITLE: Team Leader
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 05/2005 - 11/2012
DESCRIPTION: Led clinical and research programming development for the Cardiovascular Program. Managed three teams, replaced legacy systems with modern C# applications, maintained Oracle DBA responsibilities.

SOURCE: 13385306.pdf
JOB TITLE: Chief Information Officer
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 07/2000 - 02/2005
DESCRIPTION: Provided network, application, and help desk support for the Department of Mental Retardation. Managed a team of 5 across 35 facilities, upgraded to Zen 5.0 Novell, developed client-server applications.

SOURCE: 13385306.pdf
JOB TITLE: Director of Applications Development
COMPANY: Company Name
DATES: 02/1996 - 06/2000
DESCRIPTION: Provided application development and support services to the Department of Youth Services. Led Year 2000 project converting mainframe system to ASP web-based application YSIS.
